scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w demo
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @company/chatbot-core && npm run build -w @company/chatbot-service-kit && npm run build -w @company/chatbot-ui
scripts.test: npm run test -w @company/chatbot-core && npm run test -w @company/chatbot-service-kit && npm run test -w @company/chatbot-ui && npm run test -w demo
